name: Nuclear War
description: Full-scale strategic nuclear exchange: 36 individual launches across land-based ICBM silo fields and submarine patrol boxes in the Atlantic, Pacific, and under-ice Arctic, resolving into 90 confirmed inbound reentry vehicles converging on 28 Canadian cities and CAF bases from coast to coast to coast. 56 staggered high-yield detonations, followed by a nationwide fallout/aftermath phase. No launches are simultaneous -- every wave and impact is spread out in time.

land_launch_wave.summary: Multiple simultaneous missile launches detected, land-based ICBM silo field.
land_launch_wave.main_event: Confirmed: coordinated launch wave from the land domain.
land_launch_wave.prediction: Impact estimated within 20-30 minutes if trajectories hold.
land_launch_wave.suggestion: Activate NORAD continuity protocols. Alert federal government for relocation to continuity-of-government sites.

trajectory_land_wave.summary: Trajectory analysis resolves multiple inbound reentry vehicles from the land domain, each assigned a target city.
trajectory_land_wave.main_event: Confirmed: multiple inbound reentry vehicles tracking toward Canadian population centers, land vector.
trajectory_land_wave.prediction: Time to impact: approximately 10-20 minutes per target.
trajectory_land_wave.suggestion: Issue a nationwide emergency alert. Order shelter/evacuation per municipal nuclear response plans.

atlantic_launch_wave.summary: Multiple simultaneous missile launches detected, submarine-launched ballistic missile, Atlantic patrol box.
atlantic_launch_wave.main_event: Confirmed: coordinated launch wave from the atlantic domain.
atlantic_launch_wave.prediction: Impact estimated within 20-30 minutes if trajectories hold.
atlantic_launch_wave.suggestion: Activate NORAD continuity protocols. Alert federal government for relocation to continuity-of-government sites.

detonation_ottawa.summary: Seismic and RF sensors confirm a high-yield detonation at Ottawa.
detonation_ottawa.prediction: Fallout plume expected to spread with prevailing winds.
detonation_ottawa.suggestion: Activate mass-casualty and continuity-of-government protocols. Begin fallout modeling and downwind evacuation.
